styles.h1: font-heading text-5xl md:text-7xl font-medium tracking-tight text-[#D4AF37]
styles.h3: font-heading text-xl md:text-2xl font-normal tracking-wide text-[#F4E29E]
styles.caption: font-body text-xs tracking-[0.2em] uppercase text-[#D4AF37]/80

layout_strategies.dashboard_grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-6 p-6 min-h-screen bg-[#1A0505]
layout_strategies.sidebar: fixed left-0 top-0 h-full w-20 md:w-64 bg-[#0F0303]/90 border-r border-[#D4AF37]/20 z-50 transition-all duration-300

bento_grid.wrapper: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-6 auto-rows-[400px]

CatalogGrid.description: A dynamic masonry-style grid for displaying perfume items. Uses 'Bento' logic.
CatalogGrid.styles: grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-6
CatalogGrid.item_style: group relative overflow-hidden border border-[#D4AF37]/10 bg-[#2D0A0A]/40 hover:border-[#D4AF37]/50 transition-all duration-500

ItemCard.description: Minimalist luxury card. Image dominates. Text appears on hover or sits elegantly below.

elements.image: aspect-[3/4] object-cover w-full opacity-90 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity
elements.overlay: absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-t from-[#1A0505] via-transparent to-transparent opacity-60
elements.details: absolute bottom-0 left-0 right-0 p-6 translate-y-2 group-hover:translate-y-0 transition-transform duration-300

elements.logo_area: h-24 flex items-center justify-center border-b border-[#D4AF37]/10
elements.nav_item: flex items-center gap-4 px-6 py-4 text-[#F5F5F0]/70 hover:text-[#D4AF37] hover:bg-[#D4AF37]/5 transition-colors font-body tracking-widest text-sm uppercase

ItemDetailModal.wrapper: fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-sm
ItemDetailModal.content: w-full max-w-5xl h-[80vh] bg-[#1A0505] border border-[#D4AF37]/30 grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 overflow-hidden shadow-2xl animate-in fade-in zoom-in-95 duration-300

FilterBar.description: Horizontal scrolling pill list or top bar.
FilterBar.style: flex gap-4 overflow-x-auto pb-4 mb-8 scrollbar-hide
FilterBar.item: px-6 py-2 border border-[#D4AF37]/30 text-[#D4AF37] hover:bg-[#D4AF37] hover:text-[#1A0505] transition-all font-body text-xs tracking-widest uppercase cursor-pointer whitespace-nowrap

images.logo_ref: Use a text-only Original Parfums monogram in gold instead of an external logo asset.

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL FONTS: Add the Google Fonts import to public/index.html or the main CSS file immediately.
TAILWIND CONFIG: Update tailwind.config.js to include the custom colors (burgundy #1A0505, gold #D4AF37) and font families defined in 'typography'.
GLOBAL CSS: Set body background to #1A0505 and text to #F5F5F0. Add a subtle noise texture overlay if possible.
SIDEBAR: Create a fixed sidebar on the left. On mobile, make it a drawer.
MOCK DATA: Create a robust 'perfumes' array with at least 8 items. Each must have id, name, brand, price, notes (array), and image (rotate the provided Unsplash images).
DETAIL MODAL: When a card is clicked, open the Modal. The modal should look like a magazine spread.
NO DEFAULT SHADCN: Heavily override Shadcn components. No white backgrounds. No rounded-md (use rounded-none or rounded-sm for a sharper luxury feel).
TESTING: Add data-testid to all interactive elements (search-input, filter-btn, product-card-{id}, add-to-cart-btn).
universal_guidelines: Avoid gradients on text unless it is a very large heading.
Do not use generic centered layouts. Use asymmetry.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Never use pure black #000000; use #1A0505 or #0F0303.
